serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-24. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. Dynamic Workflow tool needs manual review (did NOT auto-run R24) — do audits directly via Grep/Read.

open_issues.sg24a1_R24: uncheckedtypeassertion (registered cmd/linters/main.go:36, UNENFORCED). EXACTLY 2 prod single-value violations (whole pkg/+cmd/): jsonmarshalignoredeerror.go:26 + strconvparseignorederror.go:34 — both `insp := pass.ResultOf[inspect.Analyzer].(*inspector.Inspector)` (the 2 newest analyzers). 16 siblings use safe two-value `insp,ok:=...; if !ok { return nil, fmt.Errorf(...) }` (ctxbackground.go:29-32). Analyzer exempts only two-value/type-switch/test. Issue filed: fix 2 sites + append -uncheckedtypeassertion to cgo.yml:1040. Expect lands R25.
open_issues.sgbo1_defensible: 2 filepath.Join variants intentional: cli/git.go:303 trailing-slash, cli/fix_command.go:410 Separator-suffix.

completed_scans: Resolved+enforced: errstringmatch(R14) panicinlibrarycode(R19) manualmutexunlock/osexit/rawlog(R21) regexp/fprintln/strconv(R23) jsonmarshal(sg23a1 R24, 19 sites triaged). type_assert: sg18a1 FIXED; R24 only 2 single-value left=sg24a1. fmt_errorf %w universal(1404). sync defer-Unlock universal. octal 57(R8). DEFER: largefunc(>60)/excessivefuncparams(>8) R5-6 17fn/11fn refactor-heavy unfiled; ctxbackground 28 sites unfiled. DO-NOT-REFILE (dismissed): ossetenvlibrary 10, contextcancelnotdeferred 6, fileclosenotdeferred zero-prod.

patterns.type_assert: uncheckedtypeassertion exempts ONLY two-value(len Lhs==2 && Rhs==1)/type-switch(Type==nil)/test — NOT sync.Map/ResultOf/post-ctor (those are my judgment). pass.ResultOf single-value IS flagged. Safe ResultOf form: `insp,ok:=pass.ResultOf[inspect.Analyzer].(*inspector.Inspector); if !ok { return nil, fmt.Errorf(...) }`.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS. R24=9 flags: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib -regexpcompileinfunction -fprintlnsprintf -strconvparseignorederror -jsonmarshalignoredeerror. Append for zero-vio; refactor///nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.enforce_landed_3consec: PROVEN R22->R23->R24: audit registered-but-unenforced linter -> fix-to-zero -> file enforce issue = HIGHEST-ROI, lands within the week. Re-filing dismissed prod-site issues does NOT land. Frame as 'fix N trivial sites then enforce', NOT 'refactor N sites'.
patterns.self_consistency: Linter framework's own analyzers should pass enforced linters. sg24a1: 2 newest analyzers regressed from established two-value ResultOf idiom — clean landable ask.

linters_R24.enforced_9: errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror
linters_R24.unenforced_9: contextcancelnotdeferred(dismissed) ctxbackground(28,refactor) errormessage(opt-in) excessivefuncparams(refactor) fileclosenotdeferred(zero,dismissed) largefunc(refactor) ossetenvlibrary(dismissed) ssljson(not-go-code) uncheckedtypeassertion(sg24a1 filed)
linters_R24.next_candidates: Reverify sg24a1 R25. After it lands, clean enforce candidates EXHAUSTED. Pivot R25+: (a) errormessage opt-in scope, (b) ctxbackground 28-site scoped refactor proposal, (c) watch for NEW 19th linter (registry grows ~1/few-runs).

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks: multi-stmt compounds (esp /testdata/ literal or cat repo-memory path), mkdir/ls/find-exec/wc/cat/sed outside repo dir, for-loops(simple_expansion), heredoc {quote}, git on /tmp dirs (cd or -C). go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue list --json 'Malformed version:' — use gh api search/issues -f q=... --jq '.items[]|select(.html_url)'. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT write /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory (use Write/Edit; append via Edit on unique tail). /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ bash-writable. safeoutputs `. < file.json`. Dynamic Workflow needs manual review. KEEP MEMORY FILES SMALL — 10KB patch limit; prefer Edit over full Write rewrites.
